headline: Why Is Genuine Parts (GPC) Down 16.7% Since Last Earnings Report?
summary: Genuine Parts (GPC) reported earnings 30 days ago. What's next for the stock? We take a look at earnings estimates for some clues.

headline: 3 Dividend Aristocrat Stocks That Are Dirt Cheap Right Now
summary: Wall Street’s favorite momentum plays have hit a wall, and Dividend Aristocrat stocks like Roper Technologies (NASDAQ:ROP), Genuine Parts Co (NYSE:GPC), and FactSet Research Systems (NYSE:FDS) could be the biggest beneficiaries. headline: 1 Value Stock to Target This Week and 2 We Turn Down
summary: The low valuation multiples for value stocks provide a margin of safety that growth stocks rarely offer. However, the challenge lies in determining whether these cheap assets are genuinely undervalued or simply on sale due to their potentially deteriorating business models.

headline: Best Dividend Kings: March 2026
summary: The Dividend Kings outperformed SPY year-to-date, up 2.06% versus SPY's 3.06% loss, despite a March pullback. Check out the list here.
